calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Irene Barrese for and with Alexander Nayberg (Petitioner).

The Court noted that Ms. Mendoza was not present. Ms. Barrese presented a proposed order and stated that the value of the Estate is about $800,000.00. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Continued To Apr-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Tanya Mendoza in Propria Persona.

Mr. Mendoza stated that she is contesting, that she is still seeking an Attorney and that Mr. Nayberg and his Attorney have been uncooperative. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to April 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
